listings.dealer: Cherry Hill Chrysler Dodge Jeep Ram

top10.introHtml: Top 10 best buys for a cheap fun second convertible near Media, PA — ranked by model reliability, condition, mileage, and proximity. Max 2 BMW picks for variety. Refreshed 2026-06-25.

picks.whyGood: Lowest-mileage German cabriolet in the dataset at 45,587mi. B6 A4 Cabriolet is an elegant drop-top with the proven 1.8T engine — tuneable, strong parts availability, and Good Deal rated. Passes Cars.com clean-title and no-accidents filters.
whatToVerify: Operate top through a full open/close cycle — listen for hesitation, watch for binding
Check headliner and rear carpet for water stains and mold smell
Inspect rear window seam and plastic clarity (yellowing = age cracking soon)
Check rocker panels and sills for rust (convertibles lack structural rigidity — rust here is serious)
Audi B6 cabriolet: 1.8T timing belt service history (cam belt drives water pump); check for oil leaks at valve cover; convertible top micro-switch failures common
picks.bottomLine: $9,950 for a 2004 Audi A4 1.8T Cabriolet with 45,587 miles — condition-first pick, recommend a full PPI.

picks.whyGood: E93 BMW 328i Convertible — the best-balanced modern convertible in this dataset. Only 9 miles from Media, 80K on a proven N52 engine, and the E93 retractable hardtop works flawlessly. Sharp handling, comfortable top-up, and proper back seats.
whatToVerify: Operate top through a full open/close cycle — listen for hesitation, watch for binding
Check headliner and rear carpet for water stains and mold smell
Inspect rear window seam and plastic clarity (yellowing = age cracking soon)
Check rocker panels and sills for rust (convertibles lack structural rigidity — rust here is serious)
BMW: check oil consumption at fill-up, cooling system plastic hoses and thermostat housing for brittleness, soft-top hydraulic ram condition
picks.bottomLine: $10,900 for a 2010 BMW 328i Convertible with 80,232 miles, 9mi away — top pick for modern fun.

picks.whyGood: Only 44,000 miles on a GT V8 SN-95 Mustang convertible — exceptional for the year. 5.0 HO V8 sounds incredible open, parts are dirt cheap, and the car passed Cars.com clean-title and no-accidents filters.
whatToVerify: Operate top through a full open/close cycle — listen for hesitation, watch for binding
Check headliner and rear carpet for water stains and mold smell
Inspect rear window seam and plastic clarity (yellowing = age cracking soon)
Check rocker panels and sills for rust (convertibles lack structural rigidity — rust here is serious)
SN-95 (1994–2004): check top-mount-to-rocker frame for rust; slow 1-2-3 shift to test T-3650 third-gear synchro; rear-axle clunk on takeoff; rear seat water staining from top seal
picks.bottomLine: $10,500 for a 1994 Ford Mustang GT with just 44,000 miles — V8 drop-top bargain if it checks out.

picks.whyGood: Z3 2.8 is the best Z3 — 189hp inline-6, rear-wheel drive, manual available, pure roadster ergonomics. At $7,940 and 75K miles it's the best-value pure sports car in the dataset. 15 miles from Media.
whatToVerify: Operate top through a full open/close cycle — listen for hesitation, watch for binding
Check headliner and rear carpet for water stains and mold smell
Inspect rear window seam and plastic clarity (yellowing = age cracking soon)
Check rocker panels and sills for rust (convertibles lack structural rigidity — rust here is serious)
BMW: check oil consumption at fill-up, cooling system plastic hoses and thermostat housing for brittleness, soft-top hydraulic ram condition
picks.bottomLine: $7,940 for a 2000 BMW Z3 2.8 with 75,300 miles — best price-to-fun ratio in the list.

picks.whyGood: Only 8 miles from Media, 55,000 miles, clean title and no accidents. R57 MINI Convertible is go-kart fun in a drop-top — best daily-driver convertible in this price range for someone who wants practicality plus a smile.
whatToVerify: Operate top through a full open/close cycle — listen for hesitation, watch for binding
Check headliner and rear carpet for water stains and mold smell
Inspect rear window seam and plastic clarity (yellowing = age cracking soon)
Check rocker panels and sills for rust (convertibles lack structural rigidity — rust here is serious)
MINI R57: check for coolant in oil (Tritec/Prince head gasket); test electric folding top through full cycle; inspect window regulator clips (common failure)
picks.bottomLine: $9,999 for a 2015 MINI Cooper Convertible with 55,000 miles, 8mi away — the nearest clean fun.

picks.whyGood: R230 Mercedes-Benz SL500 at 53,643 miles is a jaw-dropper at this price — V8 power, two-seat roadster, retractable hardtop, AMG styling. Passes Cars.com clean-title and no-accidents filters. The ABC suspension can be expensive; price reflects that risk.
whatToVerify: Operate top through a full open/close cycle — listen for hesitation, watch for binding
Check headliner and rear carpet for water stains and mold smell
Inspect rear window seam and plastic clarity (yellowing = age cracking soon)
Check rocker panels and sills for rust (convertibles lack structural rigidity — rust here is serious)
R230 SL: panoramic hardtop mechanism is expensive to repair — operate fully through a cycle; check for ABC active body control hydraulic leaks (oily smell under car)
picks.bottomLine: $9,898 for a 2004 Mercedes-Benz SL500 with 53,643 miles — stunning value if the ABC suspension checks out.

picks.whyGood: The only Miata in the entire dataset. 177K miles means nothing on an NC Miata — these engines routinely go 200K+ with oil changes. Grand Touring adds Bilstein shocks and leather. The gold-standard cheap fun convertible, full stop.
whatToVerify: Operate top through a full open/close cycle — listen for hesitation, watch for binding
Check headliner and rear carpet for water stains and mold smell
Inspect rear window seam and plastic clarity (yellowing = age cracking soon)
Check rocker panels and sills for rust (convertibles lack structural rigidity — rust here is serious)
Miata: check under door sills, behind rear wheels, and spare tire well for rust; confirm timing chain hasn't jumped (NC uses chain — no belt service needed)
picks.bottomLine: $10,950 for the only 2012 Mazda MX-5 Miata Grand Touring in the search — miles are high, reliability is legendary.

picks.whyGood: Volvo C70 T5 with the power retractable hardtop — underrated, refined, and genuinely fun. 74,659 miles on a T5 is mid-life. The safest convertible in this list with Volvo's structural engineering for open-top cars.
whatToVerify: Operate top through a full open/close cycle — listen for hesitation, watch for binding
Check headliner and rear carpet for water stains and mold smell
Inspect rear window seam and plastic clarity (yellowing = age cracking soon)
Check rocker panels and sills for rust (convertibles lack structural rigidity — rust here is serious)
Volvo C70: test retractable hardtop through full open/close; check for oil leaks at turbo lines; timing belt/tensioner service record is critical on T5 engine
picks.bottomLine: $9,995 for a 2011 Volvo C70 T5 with 74,659 miles — the refinement pick at this price point.

picks.whyGood: C4 Corvette with only 51,712 miles — remarkable for a 1989. The 5.7L TPI V8 makes the right sound and the C4 convertible is a legitimate classic. Under $10K for a Corvette with sub-60K miles is unusual.
whatToVerify: Operate top through a full open/close cycle — listen for hesitation, watch for binding
Check headliner and rear carpet for water stains and mold smell
Inspect rear window seam and plastic clarity (yellowing = age cracking soon)
Check rocker panels and sills for rust (convertibles lack structural rigidity — rust here is serious)
C4 Corvette: digital dash and HVAC electronics are failure-prone — test every button; check for oil leaks at rear main seal; convertible top frame for fatigue cracks
picks.bottomLine: $9,426 for a 1989 Corvette Convertible with 51,712 miles — classic American V8 if the electronics cooperate.

picks.whyGood: 2001 Jaguar XK8 Convertible with only 48,977 miles — a V8 grand tourer at this price point is rare. Post-Nikasil AJ-V8 (2001+) is the reliable version. Stunning looks, cathedral-quiet at cruise, and passes Cars.com clean-title and no-accidents filters.
whatToVerify: Operate top through a full open/close cycle — listen for hesitation, watch for binding
Check headliner and rear carpet for water stains and mold smell
Inspect rear window seam and plastic clarity (yellowing = age cracking soon)
Check rocker panels and sills for rust (convertibles lack structural rigidity — rust here is serious)
Jaguar XK8: 4.0 V8 prone to coolant loss through headgasket on early cars; check all Nikasil bore engines (pre-2000 VIN) — 2001 AJ-V8 is post-fix; inspect air suspension bags
picks.bottomLine: $13,950 for a 2001 Jaguar XK8 Convertible with 48,977 miles — the most elegant car in the list at the top of budget.

mustangs.introHtml: 4 Ford Mustang convertibles found near Media, PA in budget. Ranked by trim (GT first), mileage, then distance. Refreshed 2026-06-25.

picks.whyGood: GT V8 Mustang convertible with only 44,000mi — exceptional for the year.
whatToVerify: SN-95 (1994–2004): check convertible top mount to rocker frame for rust
S197 (2005–2014): test T-3650 third-gear synchro with slow 1-2-3 shift
S550 (2015+): check electric folding top mechanism for binding; inspect drain channels
8.8 rear-axle clunk check on takeoff
Operate soft top through full cycle — motor, latches, and rear window seal
Rear seat water staining from top seal failure
1987–1993 foxbody: check subframe connectors, 5.0 HO exhaust manifold cracks
picks.bottomLine: $10,500 GT Mustang convertible, 44,000mi — V8 grunt and drop-top fun if top and drivetrain check out.

picks.whyGood: GT V8 Mustang convertible with only 55,630mi — excellent for the year.
whatToVerify: SN-95 (1994–2004): check convertible top mount to rocker frame for rust
S197 (2005–2014): test T-3650 third-gear synchro with slow 1-2-3 shift
S550 (2015+): check electric folding top mechanism for binding; inspect drain channels
8.8 rear-axle clunk check on takeoff
Operate soft top through full cycle — motor, latches, and rear window seal
Rear seat water staining from top seal failure
1987–1993 foxbody: check subframe connectors, 5.0 HO exhaust manifold cracks
picks.bottomLine: $10,495 GT Mustang convertible, 55,630mi — V8 grunt and drop-top fun if top and drivetrain check out.

picks.whyGood: Foxbody GT V8 Mustang convertible at 98,916mi — the classic SVO shape, 5.0 HO, parts everywhere.
whatToVerify: SN-95 (1994–2004): check convertible top mount to rocker frame for rust
S197 (2005–2014): test T-3650 third-gear synchro with slow 1-2-3 shift
S550 (2015+): check electric folding top mechanism for binding; inspect drain channels
8.8 rear-axle clunk check on takeoff
Operate soft top through full cycle — motor, latches, and rear window seal
Rear seat water staining from top seal failure
1987–1993 foxbody: check subframe connectors, 5.0 HO exhaust manifold cracks
picks.bottomLine: $9,500 foxbody GT Mustang convertible, 98,916mi — V8 classic if body and top check out.

picks.whyGood: Newest Mustang convertible in the dataset — S550 platform, modern tech and safety, but high mileage at 141,767mi. Fair Deal rated on CarGurus.
whatToVerify: SN-95 (1994–2004): check convertible top mount to rocker frame for rust
S197 (2005–2014): test T-3650 third-gear synchro with slow 1-2-3 shift
S550 (2015+): check electric folding top mechanism for binding; inspect drain channels
8.8 rear-axle clunk check on takeoff
Operate soft top through full cycle — motor, latches, and rear window seal
Rear seat water staining from top seal failure
1987–1993 foxbody: check subframe connectors, 5.0 HO exhaust manifold cracks
picks.bottomLine: $13,887 newest Mustang convertible, 141,767mi — most modern but check the miles carefully.
